title: Speedboat Rental by the Hour in Puerto Banus: 2026 Costs
html:
Hourly speedboat rental in Puerto Banus starts from around EUR 120 per hour, departing the marina at Muelle Ribera in the heart of the resort. A short hop puts you off Marbella in minutes, and BoatHire24 lists verified boats with local skippers along the Costa del Sol.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

Most hourly trips leave from Puerto Jose Banus, the landmark marina built in 1970 between Marbella and San Pedro de Alcantara. The harbour sits on the western Costa del Sol within reach of several anchorages.

  • Muelle Ribera: the main quay inside Puerto Banus where charter speedboats board guests.
  • Marbella seafront: a ten-minute run east for the old town and Golden Mile.
  • Cabopino: a marina and dune beach seven nautical miles east, good for a swim stop.
  • San Pedro de Alcantara: a wide beach just west of the marina, calm on summer mornings.
  • Estepona: a longer cruise west for bookings of two hours or more.

Which boat should you rent by the hour in Puerto Banus?

For short hourly trips, a nimble open speedboat seating six to eight guests is the sensible choice in Puerto Banus. Hourly hire rewards boats that board quickly and anchor easily for a swim.

  1. Open speedboat: best for fast coastal hops and swim stops, seats up to 8 guests, from EUR 120 per hour. A model such as the QuickSilver Activ 605 Open suits this brief; check the spec on the QuickSilver Activ 605 Open - 150 HP listing before booking.
  2. Sports cruiser: best for a few hours with shade and a cabin, seats up to 10 guests, from EUR 180 per hour.
  3. RIB: best for adrenaline runs and watersports, seats up to 10 guests, from EUR 140 per hour.
  4. Day motorboat: best for relaxed family cruising, seats up to 12 guests, from EUR 200 per hour.
  5. Motor yacht: best for a premium half-day, seats up to 12 guests, from EUR 450 per hour.

How much does it cost to rent a speedboat in Puerto Banus?

Expect from EUR 120 per hour for an open speedboat, with day rates rising for larger crewed boats. Prices in 2026 vary with size, season and skipper.

  • A shared coastal boat tour from Puerto Banus costs from about EUR 35 per person.
  • A small motorboat for a half day runs from roughly EUR 350 in EUR.
  • A catamaran for a full day starts at around EUR 900 in EUR.
  • A crewed motor yacht for a day begins near EUR 2,500 in EUR.

When is the best season to book a speedboat in Puerto Banus?

The high season runs from June to September, when the sea is warmest and mornings are settled. Spring and early autumn stay pleasant. The dominant local wind is the Levante, an easterly that builds a short chop, so skippers favour an early start.

Book a morning slot between June and September: the Levante easterly tends to strengthen after midday along this coast, so an early departure usually means flatter water for swimming and a smoother run back to Muelle Ribera.

Spain requires no licence for guests on a skippered charter, and many hourly speedboats can be hired bareboat within a limited power and length band; the operator confirms the exact licence requirements for your boat and date.

How does hourly booking work?

You pick a boat, choose your hours, then confirm online with the local operator who handles boarding and the route. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Puerto Banus or list your own. Most hourly trips carry a two-hour minimum in peak summer, and fuel may be billed separately.

At a glance

  • Price band: from EUR 120 per hour for an open speedboat.
  • Peak months: June to September.
  • Trip length: one to four hours, two-hour minimum in summer.
  • Capacity: up to 8 guests on an hourly speedboat.
  • Currency: EUR.

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus

Can I rent a speedboat for just one hour in Puerto Banus?

Single hours are sometimes available outside July and August, yet most operators set a two-hour minimum in peak summer because marina turnaround is tight, making a two-hour slot the reliable option.

Do I need a licence to drive a speedboat here?

Guests on a skippered charter need no licence at all, while bareboat hire is limited to boats within a defined power and length band, and the operator confirms the precise rules for your date.

Is a skipper included in the hourly price?

On many Puerto Banus speedboats a local skipper is included in the quoted hourly rate, though some bareboat options exist for qualified renters, so check the listing before you confirm.

How far can I get in a couple of hours?

A fast open speedboat comfortably reaches Marbella, Cabopino around seven nautical miles east, or San Pedro within a two-hour outing, leaving time for a swim stop.

Hourly speedboat hire is the quickest way to taste the Costa del Sol in 2026, with crystal water minutes from the quay and flexible slots for your group. Compare verified boats and skippers, then plan your yacht charter Puerto Banus and book online.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
